name: kickback-status
displayName: Kickback Status — Get Paid for Waiting
description: Shows a sponsored line in your status bar while you wait on builds, installs, and tests. You get a share of the revenue.

commands.title: Kickback Status: Activate with Invite Code
Kickback Status: Sync Earnings from Server
Kickback Status: Set Payout UPI ID
Kickback Status: Withdraw Earnings to UPI

kickbackStatus.backendUrl.description: Backend URL that serves the current sponsor line and records impressions.

kickbackStatus.enabled.description: Show sponsored status bar messages during long-running tasks.

kickbackStatus.minTaskSeconds.description: Minimum task duration (seconds) before a sponsored line is shown. Avoids flicker on instant tasks.

kickbackStatus.adRotationSeconds.description: Seconds between ad rotations during a long-running task. Each rotation is a new impression.

kickbackStatus.earningsFlashSeconds.description: Seconds the post-task 'Earned ₹X.XX this build' message stays visible before hiding.
